svg.title: Figure 1. Conceptual Model of an RL-Inspired Adaptive Training System for QSR Franchises
svg.desc: Flowchart of adaptive franchise training system with moderator and mediator boxes in the gap between training adjustments and learning outcomes.
svg.text: Figure 1. Conceptual model of an RL-inspired adaptive training system for QSR franchises

g.text: Passively captured during training — no clinical measurement
Rule-based policy inspired by reinforcement learning
Delivered in real time via tablet-based module
Measured via final accuracy and learning curves (H1, H2, H4)
RQ1: Main effect of adaptive policy on learning outcomes
RQ3: Attention and response control traits (moderation)
RQ4: Learner profile detection and adaptation

svg.text: Figure shows a cascading model: Behavioral signals feed the adaptive engine, which delivers real-time training adjustments. Outcomes depend on main effect (RQ1), mediators (RQ2), moderators (RQ3), and learner profiles (RQ4).
